mapper.sql: s.id, s.name, s.phone AS username, s.email, s.id_num, CASE sr.role_code WHEN 'CONTACT' THEN 1001 WHEN 'PAYEE' THEN 1003 ELSE 1002 END AS role_id, CASE sr.role_code WHEN 'CONTACT' THEN '联系人' WHEN 'PAYEE' THEN '收款人' ELSE '店员' END AS role_name, s.merchant_id, m.name AS merchant_name, m.code AS merchant_code, s.status, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(s.created_at) AS create_time
FROM biz_merchant_staff s JOIN biz_merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_merchant_staff_role sr ON sr.staff_id = s.id AND sr.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
s.deleted = 0
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%') OR s.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%'))
AND s.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
AND sr.role_code = CASE #{roleId} WHEN 1001 THEN 'CONTACT' WHEN 1003 THEN 'PAYEE' ELSE 'CLERK' END
AND s.status = #{status}
ORDER BY s.id DESC
SELECT WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT WHERE s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(sr.role_code, 'CONTACT', 'PAYEE', 'CLERK'), s.id
